allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node,npm,npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm' })

PowerShell($env:PATH -split ';' | Select-Object -First 30; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:NVM_HOME\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\JustinChapman\\AppData\\Roaming\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\JustinChapman\\AppData\\Local\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name; Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Node.js" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Node.js" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\JustinChapman\\AppData\\Local" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm|volta|fnm|npm' } | Select-Object Name 2>&1; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\JustinChapman\\AppData\\Roaming" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm|npm' } | Select-Object Name 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); where.exe node; where.exe npm; node --version; npm --version)
